_instructions: Fill in whichever of these you have -- leave the rest as null. Save as data/<company_slug>/manual_inputs.json (e.g. data/wipro_limited/manual_inputs.json) and re-run batch_extract.py. Booleans: true means the risk condition IS present (bad); false means it is not (good). Anything left null stays 'N/A' and is excluded from the score rather than assumed safe.
